customAttributes.description:
Flying
When Eagle of Deliverance enters the battlefield, put an indestructible counter on another target creature you control. Draw a card if that creature's power is 2 or less.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: Even as he came swooping down, Gwaihir saw the two figures fall, worn out, hiding their eyes from death.
